nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 新南威爾士州
nodes.summary: 新南威爾士州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、叢塚雉、Black-eared cuckoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 紅腰鸚鵡
nodes.summary: 紅腰鸚鵡（Red-rumped parrot，学名 Psephotus haematonotus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于新南威爾士州、維多利亞州、南澳大利亚州，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 維多利亞州
nodes.summary: 維多利亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联29种鸟类，包括尖羽树鸭、Black-eared cuckoo、巨地鸠等29种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 南澳大利亚州
nodes.summary: 南澳大利亚州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括Dusky moorhen、鹗、黄尾黑凤头鹦鹉等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Their range encompasses most of New South Wales and Victoria, as well as parts of southern Queensland and eastern South Australia. They avoid the coast and the wetter, more heavily wooded areas. Subspecies caeruleus is only found far inland surrounding the Queensland-South Australia border. They have adapted well to some urban and suburban areas and can be found in farmland, on roadside verges and in parks and gardens

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Unlike many other Australian birds which are in decline due to land clearing and deforestation, the distribution and population of the red-rumped parrot are likely increasing as ongoing land clearing creates more suitable open habitat for the species. Red-rumped parrots are often hit by cars and other vehicles when feeding on roadside verges, and are often killed by feral and outdoor cats. The introduced and invasive common myna (Acridotheres tristis) and European starling (Sturnus vulgaris) regularly outcompete red-rumped parrots and other native hollow-nesting species for nest sites
